title: Biofuels Trader
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION

  • Responsible to the direct Team Lead [TL] (or Chief Operating Officer) for achieving the target profit of the respective book business plan through, including but not limited to:
  1. Strategizing profit model of global trading for both physical and derivatives in addition to the Japanese and Korean market and conducting it with adequate speculation and risk management (market price and credit).
  2. Creating global trading flows and conducting necessary marketing activities i.e. transport /delivery /operations with international clients as well as Japanese and Korean clients (such as refineries / utility companies / trading companies or importing companies etc.) in order to fulfill the respective book strategy.
  3. Exploring business opportunities for petroleum products trading business, and/or biofuels and next-gen fuel / commodities to develop new scheme of energy commodity trading in response to the energy transition requirements in global energy trading.
  • Acts as a resource to other TL in the area of your expertise with good network with international clients or buyers, including those in Japan and Korea.
  • Work closely with Operations team for vessel operations, vessel vetting, instructions on loading/discharging/ inspections, demurrage management, cargo insurance matters, letter of credit and related troubleshooting;
  • Prepare and assist with legal correspondences for executing contract and other legal documentations in case of arbitration;
  • Support in handling insurance claims including liaising with internal and external parties (Insurers, Insurance Brokers, Ship owners, Agents, Surveyors etc.);
  • Other ad hoc assignments as necessary.

JOB REQUIREMENTS

  • Agree to our Values of “Grow together, Go further! (Be Professional, Act with Integrity, Enhance Team Spirit)”, more specifically:
  1. Have an eye for the future, shape growth strategies, inspire people around us with passion and courage.
  2. Build trust with respect, foster openness & diversity.
  3. Deliver work outcomes responsibly, on time, with high quality standards.
  • Can-do attitude, with the willingness to learn and willingness to work hard to create value, due to international nature of the business.
  • High level awareness of compliance and internal control.
  • Good degree from a recognized University.
  • Possess at least 10 years of relevant working experience in international trading of energy commodities.  Business experience and knowledge with biofuels/feedstocks, biomass energy and/or next-gen fuels, will be advantageous.
  • Good and proficient knowledge in business and partnership development, sales, brokering with strong track record of sales, origination and relation management.
  • Basic risk analysis & management, hedging, economic evaluation, financial, credit and accounting knowledge of energy trading business.
  • Good legal knowledge in Contract law especially in energy trading business. Familiar with vetting, preparing and executing trading contracts.
  • Excellent English and Japanese or Korean language skills, with the ability to logically comprehend a written document, and ability to write formal business correspondences for communication with clients Japanese/International/local) and other Mitsui Group offices (i.e. Tokyo and other offices in the network).
  • ·Good inter-personal skills for internal and external communication. Excellent skills in MS Excel, Word and PowerPoint. Willingness to learn new digital tools.

postedCompany.name: MITSUI & CO. ENERGY TRADING SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
